question: Based on the cost trend chart, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: The highest visible cost occurs in 2019.
options.B: Costs in 2021 and 2022 are clearly equal.
options.C: The chart does not show the full height of the 2022 cost, so its exact value cannot be read.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bar to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
